evidence.claim: The leaderboard aggregates nuggets earned within a configurable time window.
evidence.fact: A cohort leaderboard ranks students by total nuggets earned over a configurable time period, with options for students to opt out or for instructors to disable it entirely.
evidence.user_story_span: The leaderboard aggregates nuggets earned within a configurable time window
evidence.fact_span: ranks students by total nuggets earned over a configurable time period

evidence.claim: The system provides a cohort leaderboard ranked by nuggets over a configurable time window.
evidence.fact: The leaderboard shows cohort members ordered by nugget earnings for a chosen timeframe, and both students (via opt-out) and instructors (via disable) can hide rankings.
evidence.user_story_span: a cohort leaderboard ranked by nuggets over a configurable window
evidence.fact_span: shows cohort members ordered by nugget earnings for a chosen timeframe

evidence.claim: Students can opt out of appearing on the leaderboard.
evidence.fact: Students are positioned on a leaderboard within their cohort based on nuggets collected during a customizable window, and participation can be turned off by the student or the teacher.
evidence.user_story_span: Students can opt out of appearing on the leaderboard.
evidence.fact_span: participation can be turned off by the student

evidence.claim: Instructors can disable the entire leaderboard for the cohort.
evidence.fact: A cohort leaderboard ranks students by total nuggets earned over a configurable time period, with options for students to opt out or for instructors to disable it entirely.
evidence.user_story_span: Instructors can disable the entire leaderboard for the cohort.
evidence.fact_span: for instructors to disable it entirely
